values.description: Oracle Fusion Cloud hostname prefix (the part before .fa.{region}.oraclecloud.com). Example: ehxk-test
Oracle Fusion Cloud region/server code. Examples: em2, us2, uk2, ap1
Full Oracle Fusion Cloud base URL. Set this to https://{fusion_hostname}.fa.{fusion_region}.oraclecloud.com
Oracle Fusion Cloud username used for HTTP Basic Authentication on all REST and SOAP calls
Oracle Fusion Cloud password. Keep secret — never commit to version control
VendHQ REST API base URL (v2.0). All VendHQ endpoints are relative to this URL
VendHQ API Bearer token used in the Authorization header. Obtain from VendHQ Settings > API Access
Opencart store base URL. All Opencart REST endpoints are relative to this URL
Opencart REST API key sent in the X-Oc-Restadmin-Id header
ISO 8601 date used to filter Fusion items/transactions by LastUpdateDate. Adjust to your desired cutoff date (YYYY-MM-DD)
VendHQ retailer subdomain (the part before .vendhq.com). Example: ibraheemalqurashi
VendHQ product UUID used in single-product and image-upload requests
VendHQ customer UUID used in single-customer lookup requests
ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) – start of the date range for Opencart order queries
ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) – end of the date range for Opencart order queries
Base64-encoded 'username:password' string for Oracle Fusion SOAP Basic Auth header. Generate with: echo -n 'user:pass' | base64
